main.description: A UV / contact-printing exposure light source (for alternative processes and contact printing). instance.lightSource references this. (Enlarger illumination lives on enlargerType.headType instead.)

peakWavelengthNm.description: Peak UV wavelength (e.g. 365, 395); alt processes want ~350-400nm.

integrator.description: Has a light integrator (exposure measured in units, compensating for lamp aging).

image.description: Product photo for this type, typically the manufacturer box/product shot. When unset, clients fall back to a Wikidata image.

datasheet.description: Official datasheet: a link (preferred), an uploaded file, or another record.
